name: list_items
description: Retrieve items from a specific Monday.com board, optionally filtered by group or column values. Returns item names, column values, creation dates, and creator info. Supports cursor-based pagination for boards with many items.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query string to fetch items from a board.
parameters.example: { boards (ids: [1234567890]) { items_page (limit: 25) { cursor items { id name column_values { id text value } } } } }

parameters.name: board_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the board to list items from (used inside the GraphQL query).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (used inside the GraphQL query, max 500).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response for fetching the next page.

body.query: { boards (ids: [1234567890]) { items_page (limit: 25) { cursor items { id name created_at creator { id name } group { id title } column_values { id text type value } } } } }
